package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for update_single_row_in_loop_without_batch: GORM Update(...), UpdateColumn(...), or Updates(...) calls observed inside loops one row at a time.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule302PositiveRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario302Positive(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	for _, id := range ids {
		updates := map[string]any{"seen": true, "id": id}
		if err := db.Where("id = ?", id).Preload("Items").Updates(updates).Error; err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return db.Order("created_at desc").Find(&[]Rule302PositiveRecord{}).Error
}
